documentation.file_docstring: Registry entry tracking a client manager and its associated account.
inline_comments: Global registry of client managers. Keyed by account ID.
Get or create a client manager for an account. @param accountId - The account ID @param logger - Logger instance @returns The client manager
Get an existing client manager for an account. @param accountId - The account ID @returns The client manager, or undefined if not registered
Disconnect and remove a client manager from the registry. @param accountId - The account ID @returns Promise that resolves when cleanup is complete
Disconnect and remove all client managers from the registry. @returns Promise that resolves when all cleanup is complete
Get the number of registered client managers. @returns The count of registered managers
Clear all client managers without disconnecting. This is primarily for testing purposes.

functions.name: getOrCreateClientManager
functions.doc: Get or create a client manager for an account.      accountId - The account ID    logger - Logger instance    The client

functions.name: getClientManager
functions.doc: Get an existing client manager for an account.      accountId - The account ID    The client manager, or undefined if no

functions.name: removeClientManager
functions.doc: Disconnect and remove a client manager from the registry.      accountId - The account ID    Promise that resolves when

functions.name: removeAllClientManagers
functions.doc: Disconnect and remove all client managers from the registry.      Promise that resolves when all cleanup is complete

functions.name: getRegisteredClientManagerCount
functions.doc: Get the number of registered client managers.      The count of registered managers

functions.name: _clearAllClientManagersForTest
functions.doc: Clear all client managers without disconnecting.     This is primarily for testing purposes.
